validation.skillDescription: Analyze a repository and current Codex environment, then recommend Codex CLI, Codex App, AGENTS.md, skills, native subagents, plugins, MCP servers, config/hooks, and optional OMX workflow improvements without modifying files. Use when the user asks to optimize Codex workflows, improve Codex setup, recommend Codex automation, configure MCP/plugins/subagents, analyze AGENTS.md scope needs, or says "优化 Codex 流程", "Codex 工作流推荐", "给 Codex 配 MCP", "配置 Codex plugins", or "配置 Codex subagents".
